title: Book Of Nonsense Limerick 10.
content:
There was an Old Man in a tree,
    Who was horribly bored by a Bee;
    When they said, "Does it buzz?"
    He replied, "Yes, it does!
    "It's a regular brute of a Bee!"
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Edward Lear delivers a powerful performance in "Book Of Nonsense Limerick 10."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
